name: Cuchara
notes: Trail count: 9 total = 5 beginner + 4 intermediate. Skiresort.info (cuchara-mountain-park) lists 6 km total: easy 2 km/33%, intermediate 3 km/50%, difficult 1 km/17%. Used trail-count breakdown (more accurate for a beginner/intermediate-only hill).

name: Dartmouth Skiway
notes: OnTheSnow trail-count breakdown. Skiresort.info confirms 16 km of slopes (easy 25/intermediate 50/difficult 25).

name: Deer Valley Resort
notes: OnTheSnow reported 202 runs, 31% beginner / 45% intermediate / 24% expert (no separate advanced). Split the 24% into 12% advanced + 12% expert per Strategy B convention. Skiresort.info has 202 km of slopes (easy 35/intermediate 44/difficult 21).

name: Detroit Mountain
notes: Reported 35/35/30 beginner/intermediate/advanced. Skiresort.info shows only 2 km, 50/50/0 (less detailed). Used trail-percent breakdown.

name: Detroit Mountain Recreation Area
notes: Duplicate of 'detroit' slug — same resort.

name: Devil's Head Resort
notes: 30 runs, 30% beginner / 40% intermediate / 30% expert reported. Split the 30% expert into 15% advanced + 15% expert. Skiresort.info has 10 km of slopes (easy 30/intermediate 35/difficult 35).

name: Diamond Peak
notes: OnTheSnow lists 40 runs across 655 acres with 8/28/33/33 split.

name: Discovery Ski Area
notes: Skiresort.info: 45 km slopes (easy 28/intermediate 26/difficult 46). Split difficult 46% into advanced 23% + expert 23%. OnTheSnow confirms 74 total runs.

name: Dodge Ridge
notes: Skiresort.info 50 km: easy 20/intermediate 40/difficult 40. Split difficult into 20% advanced + 20% expert. OnTheSnow says 71 runs but no breakdown.

name: Dog Creek Lodge & Nordic Center
notes: not found — XC-only nordic center, not listed on skiresort.info/OnTheSnow/SkiCentral/SnowPak. Skiresort.info 'dog-creek-lodge' and 'dog-creek-lodge-nordic-center' slugs both return portal homepage. No difficulty breakdown available.

name: Donner Ski Ranch
notes: OnTheSnow: 52 runs, 31/38/21/10 split. Skiresort.info has 52 km of slopes (easy 25/intermediate 50/difficult 25).

name: Dry Hill Ski Area
notes: OnTheSnow shows 7 runs, 33/34/33 (no expert listed). Skiresort.info confirms 2.4 km of slopes (easy 29/intermediate 50/difficult 21). Note: input said 13 total trails — OnTheSnow says 7.

name: Eagle Point Resort
notes: OnTheSnow: 43 runs, 23/30/28/19 split.

name: Eagle Rock Resort
notes: Skiresort.info: 2.5 km slopes, easy 28/intermediate 40/difficult 32. Split difficult into 16% advanced + 16% expert. Trail count 14 from SkiCentral / Snow-Forecast search results.

name: Eaglecrest
notes: OnTheSnow: 37 runs, 32% beginner / 38% intermediate / 30% advanced (no expert listed). Split advanced 30% into 15% advanced + 15% expert. Resort website reports 36 runs.

name: Eaglecrest Ski Area
notes: Duplicate of 'eaglecrest' slug — same resort in Juneau, AK.

name: Eaton Mountain
notes: Wikipedia/SkiNewEngland: 18 trails (5 beginner + 7 intermediate + 6 expert = 28/39/33 pct). Split expert 33% into 17% advanced + 17% expert. Skiresort.info shows only 2 km (75/25/0).

name: Echo Mountain
notes: Skiresort.info: 3 km slopes, easy 67/intermediate 33/difficult 0. Trail count 16 from uncovercolorado.com. OnTheSnow lists 7 runs but no breakdown.

name: Echo Valley Ski Area
notes: Skiresort.info: 7 km slopes, easy 33/intermediate 40/difficult 27. Split difficult 27% into 14% advanced + 13% expert. Total trails not found (volunteer non-profit area, no count published).

name: Eldora Mountain Resort
notes: OnTheSnow: 63 trails, 19/48/19/14 split. Skiresort.info has 52 km slopes (easy 21/intermediate 50/difficult 29).

name: Elk Mountain Ski Resort
notes: OnTheSnow: 27 trails, 22/37/41 (no expert listed). Skiresort.info confirms 15 km slopes (easy 20/intermediate 53/difficult 27). Split advanced 41% into 21% advanced + 20% expert.

name: Elko SnoBowl
notes: Travelnevada.com: 10 trails, half beginner / half intermediate, no advanced/expert. Skiresort.info confirms 3 km (50/50/0).

name: Ferguson Ridge Ski Area
notes: Skiresort.info: 5 km slopes, easy 40/intermediate 40/difficult 20. Split difficult 20% into 10% advanced + 10% expert. 8 main trails per skifergi.com.

name: Four Lakes Alpine Snowsports
notes: Freeride: 4 runs = 2 beginner / 1 intermediate / 1 advanced = 50/25/25/0. Skiresort.info shows only 1 km of slopes (100% easy).

name: Franconia Village XC Ski Area
notes: not found — cross-country (nordic) ski area, not indexed on skiresort.info/OnTheSnow/SkiCentral/SnowPak for downhill-style difficulty breakdown.

name: Frost Fire Park

name: Garnet Hill XC
notes: not found — cross-country (nordic) ski center, not indexed on skiresort.info/OnTheSnow/SkiCentral/SnowPak for downhill-style difficulty breakdown.
